string.name: app_name
string.translation_description: Application Title

string.name: menu_settings
string.translation_description: Settings menu item in the options menu

string.name: menu_search
string.translation_description: Search menu item in the options menu

string.name: cancel
string.translation_description: Generic cancel button label used in dialogs

string.name: go
string.translation_description: Button to start navigating the sky map toward a searched object

string.name: start_from_now
string.translation_description: Button in the time travel dialog to start time travelling from the current time

string.name: other_prefs
string.translation_description: Preferences category heading for miscellaneous settings

string.name: controls_prefs
string.translation_description: Preferences category heading for touch control settings

string.name: location_permission_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title of the dialog that requests location permission from the user

string.name: location_permission_dialog_message
string.translation_description: Body text of the dialog requesting location permission, explaining why the app needs it and what happens without it

resources.string: Sky Mapは正確な夜空を表示するために、おおよその位置情報が必要です。権限を許可するか、位置情報を手動で入力するか、後で決定することができます。後で決定する場合、位置情報が設定されるまでマップは正確ではありません。

string.name: location_permission_grant
string.translation_description: Button in the location permission dialog to grant location access

string.name: location_permission_enter_manually
string.translation_description: Button in the location permission dialog to enter location by hand instead of granting permission

string.name: location_permission_later
string.translation_description: Button in the location permission dialog to defer the decision

string.name: location_set_auto
string.translation_description: Toast message when automatic location is acquired. %1$s is the place name or coordinates

resources.string: 位置が %1$s に設定されました

string.name: location_long_lat
string.translation_description: Formatted display of longitude and latitude. %1$.2f is longitude, %2$.2f is latitude

string.name: degrees
string.translation_description: angular degrees - used for latitude and longitude

string.name: location_acquiring_title
string.translation_description: Title of dialog shown while acquiring the user\'s location automatically

string.name: location_acquiring_message
string.translation_description: Body text of dialog shown while Sky Map is waiting to acquire the device GPS or network location

string.name: location_keep_waiting
string.translation_description: Button to keep waiting for an automatic location fix

string.name: location_permanently_denied_title
string.translation_description: Title of dialog shown when location permission was permanently denied by the user

string.name: location_permanently_denied_message
string.translation_description: Body text explaining that location permission was permanently denied and how to fix it

resources.string: 位置情報の許可が永続的に拒否されました。アプリ設定を開いて再度有効にしてください。

string.name: location_open_settings
string.translation_description: Button that opens the system app settings page so the user can re-grant location permission

string.name: location_manual_entry_title
string.translation_description: Title of the dialog where the user types their location manually

string.name: location_place_name_hint
string.translation_description: Placeholder text in the place name input field

resources.string: 都市または場所の名前

string.name: location_latitude_hint
string.translation_description: Placeholder text in the latitude input field

string.name: location_longitude_hint
string.translation_description: Placeholder text in the longitude input field

string.name: location_resolve_button
string.translation_description: Button that looks up coordinates for a typed place name

string.name: location_set_button
string.translation_description: Button that confirms and applies the manually entered location

string.name: location_place_not_found
string.translation_description: Inline error shown when a place name search returns no results

resources.string: 場所が見つかりません。より詳しい名前を入力してください

string.name: location_geocoder_offline
string.translation_description: Inline message shown when geocoding fails because there is no internet connection

resources.string: インターネットがありません。座標を直接入力してください

string.name: location_invalid_latitude
string.translation_description: Validation error for latitude values outside the valid range

resources.string: 緯度は−90～90の間である必要があります

string.name: location_invalid_longitude
string.translation_description: Validation error for longitude values outside the valid range

resources.string: 経度は−180～180の間である必要があります

string.name: location_management_title
string.translation_description: Title of the location management screen

string.name: location_source_auto
string.translation_description: Label shown when the device is determining location automatically

string.name: location_source_manual
string.translation_description: Label shown when the user has manually entered their location

string.name: location_source_acquiring
string.translation_description: Label shown while waiting for the first automatic location fix

string.name: location_source_unset
string.translation_description: Label shown when no location has been set

resources.string: 現在地が設定されていません

string.name: location_source_hardware_unavailable
string.translation_description: Label shown when the device has no location hardware

resources.string: このデバイスでは位置情報が利用できません

string.name: location_switch_to_auto
string.translation_description: Button to switch from manual location to automatic detection

string.name: location_switch_to_manual
string.translation_description: Button to switch from automatic to manual location entry

string.name: location_change
string.translation_description: Button to change or update the manually entered location

string.name: location_map_no_location
string.translation_description: Message shown in the map area when no location is set

resources.string: 現在地が設定されていません。下をタップして追加してください

string.name: location_map_acquiring
string.translation_description: Message shown in the map area while waiting for a GPS fix

string.name: location_map_unavailable
string.translation_description: Message shown in the map area when the map image cannot be loaded

resources.string: マップが利用できません

string.name: location_map_content_description
string.translation_description: Accessibility description for the map image showing the user\'s location

resources.string: 現在地を表示するマップ

string.name: location_diagnostic_format
string.translation_description: Format for location in diagnostics: lat, lon (source). %1$.4f is lat, %2$.4f is lon, %3$s is source

string.name: diagnostics_ra_format
string.translation_description: Format for Right Ascension: hours, minutes, seconds. %1$d is hours, %2$d is minutes, %3$d is seconds

string.name: use_magnetic_correction
string.translation_description: Preference label: apply magnetic declination correction so the compass points to true north instead of magnetic north

string.name: manual_compass_adjustment_title
string.translation_description: Preference title: lets the user add a manual degree offset to the compass reading

string.name: manual_compass_adjustment_summary
string.translation_description: Summary for the manual compass adjustment preference

resources.string: コンパス読み取り値に追加される度数単位の追加オフセット（+ または −）

string.name: show_stars_pref
string.translation_description: Label for the stars layer on the sky map (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_constellations_pref
string.translation_description: Label for the constellation lines and labels layer (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_deep_sky_objects_pref
string.translation_description: Deep-sky objects layer — galaxies, nebulae, star clusters, and other notable objects (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_planets_pref
string.translation_description: Label for the solar system layer (planets, sun, moon) (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_grid_pref
string.translation_description: Label for the Right Ascension / Declination grid overlay (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_horizon_pref
string.translation_description: Preference toggle label for the horizon line layer

string.name: show_sky_gradient
string.translation_description: This is a shading of the color of the sky used for effect

string.name: show_meteors_pref
string.translation_description: Label for the meteor shower layer (shows in the search results)

string.name: show_comet_layer_pref
string.translation_description: Preference toggle label for the comets layer

string.name: show_satellite_layer_pref
string.translation_description: The layer for satellites

string.name: sensor_prefs
string.translation_description: Preferences category heading for sensor settings, intended for advanced/expert users

string.name: sensor_speed
string.translation_description: Old, non gyro sensors only: How quickly the sensor should send us data

string.name: sensor_damping
string.translation_description: Old, non gyro sensors only: The amount of smoothing applied to the sensor outputs.

string.name: appearance_prefs
string.translation_description: Preferences title for section about app appearance

string.name: auto_dimness_preference
string.translation_description: Mode for automatically dimming the screen when night mode is selected

string.name: font_size_preference
string.translation_description: Change the font size

string.name: font_size_preference_description
string.translation_description: help to go along with the change font size preference

resources.string: ラベルテキストサイズを調整

string.name: show_sky_gradient_preference_title
string.translation_description: Setting toggle title: whether to show the blue sky gradient during the day

resources.string: 空のグラデーションを表示

string.name: show_sky_gradient_preference_summary
string.translation_description: Setting toggle summary for sky gradient: explains what the feature does

resources.string: 太陽の近くは空を青くし、反対側は暗くします

string.name: ecliptic
string.translation_description: Label for the ecliptic layer — the apparent annual path of the Sun across the sky

string.name: dialog_accept
string.translation_description: accepting the licence agreement

string.name: dialog_decline
string.translation_description: declining the licence agreement

string.name: menu_credits
string.translation_description: menu item to show \'Credits\' box

string.name: credits_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title of the credits dialog showing acknowledgements and contributors

string.name: menu_help
string.translation_description: menu item to show \'Help\' box

string.name: help_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title of the help dialog

string.name: set_manual
string.translation_description: Toast message shown when the user switches to manual (touch-drag) mode

resources.string: 手動モードに切り替え中

string.name: set_auto
string.translation_description: Toast message shown when the user switches to automatic (sensor/gyroscope) mode

resources.string: 自動モードに切り替え中

string.name: menu_toggle_dim
string.translation_description: Menu item to toggle night mode (red tint that preserves night vision)

resources.string: 夜間モードの切り替え

string.name: zenith
string.translation_description: Label for the zenith point (directly overhead) shown on the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: nadir
string.translation_description: Label for the nadir point (directly below) shown on the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: north
string.translation_description: Compass direction label shown on the horizon of the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: east
string.translation_description: Compass direction label shown on the horizon of the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: west
string.translation_description: Compass direction label shown on the horizon of the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: south
string.translation_description: Compass direction label shown on the horizon of the sky map. Displayed in capitals.

string.name: search_label
string.translation_description: Hint/label for the search bar in the search activity

string.name: search_hint
string.translation_description: an example search target

string.name: no_search_title
string.translation_description: Dialog title shown when a sky search returns no results

string.name: no_search_results_text2
string.translation_description: Alternative message shown when a search returns no results, suggesting the object may not currently be visible

resources.string: 検索結果が見つかりません。おそらくそれは現在見えないのでしょう。

string.name: many_search_results_title
string.translation_description: Dialog title shown when a search returns multiple possible matches

string.name: other
string.translation_description: A preference category (ie preferences that don't belong in any other category)

string.name: menu_time
string.translation_description: Menu item label to open the time travel feature

string.name: time_travel_start_message_alt
string.translation_description: Toast message when time travel starts toward a named destination. %s is the event or destination name

string.name: time_travel_close_message
string.translation_description: Toast message shown when the user exits time travel and returns to the present

string.name: popular_dates_prompt
string.translation_description: Label for a list of dates the user can choose from

string.name: custom_date_prompt
string.translation_description: Label telling the user to manually specify a date

resources.string: または表示する日付を手動で選択

string.name: change_date_prompt
string.translation_description: Button label to open the date picker in the time travel dialog

string.name: change_time_prompt
string.translation_description: Button label to open the time picker in the time travel dialog

string.name: now_visiting
string.translation_description: used in time travel dialog to show the destination date/time the user has selected, time formatted as yyyy.mm.dd at hh.mm.ss + timezone

string.name: time_travel_label_past
string.translation_description: Label showing that we are in the past

resources.string: タイムトラベル: 過去

string.name: time_travel_label_future
string.translation_description: Label showing that we are in the future

resources.string: タイムトラベル: 未来

string.name: time_travel_stopped
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

resources.string: タイムトラベル停止中

string.name: time_travel_second_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time. The symbol means greater than.

string.name: time_travel_minute_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_10minute_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_hour_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_day_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_week_speed
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_second_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_minute_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_10minute_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_hour_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_day_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_week_speed_back
string.translation_description: Label showing rate of travel through time

string.name: time_travel_select_hint
string.translation_description: Placeholder hint text for the dropdown list of popular astronomical events in the time travel dialog

resources.string: -- 人気のあるイベントを選択 --

string.name: time_travel_next_sunset
string.translation_description: Name of a popular astronomical event in the time travel picker

string.name: time_travel_next_sunrise
string.translation_description: Name of a popular astronomical event in the time travel picker

string.name: time_travel_next_fullmoon
string.translation_description: Name of a popular astronomical event in the time travel picker

string.name: time_travel_next_newmoon
string.translation_description: Name of a popular astronomical event in the time travel picker

string.name: time_travel_mercury_transit_2016
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A Mercury transit is when Mercury passes across the face of the Sun as seen from Earth. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

string.name: time_travel_solar_eclipse_2024
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

string.name: time_travel_apollo_11
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker: the first crewed Moon landing in 1969

string.name: time_travel_jupiter_saturn_2020
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A conjunction is when two planets appear very close together in the sky.

string.name: time_travel_six_planet_parade_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A planet parade is when several planets are visible at once. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

string.name: time_travel_lunar_eclipse_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

string.name: time_travel_lyrids_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. The Lyrids are an annual meteor shower. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: リリッド流星群、2026年4月22日

string.name: time_travel_venus_jupiter_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A conjunction is when two planets appear very close together in the sky. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: 金星・木星接近、2026年6月9日

string.name: time_travel_mars_uranus_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A close approach is when two objects appear near each other in the sky. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: 火星・天王星接近、2026年7月4日

string.name: time_travel_solar_eclipse_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

string.name: time_travel_perseids_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. The Perseids are an annual meteor shower. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: ペルセウス座流星群、2026年8月12～13日

string.name: time_travel_jupiter_occultation_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A lunar occultation is when the Moon passes in front of a planet, briefly hiding it. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: 月による木星の掩蔽、2026年10月6日

string.name: time_travel_geminids_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. The Geminids are an annual meteor shower. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: ふたご座流星群、2026年12月13～14日

string.name: time_travel_supermoon_2026
string.translation_description: Name of an astronomical event in the time travel picker. A supermoon is a full moon that occurs near the Moon\'s closest approach to Earth. Keep the date format suitable for your locale.

resources.string: クリスマスイブのスーパームーン、2026年12月24日

string.name: use_sound_effects
string.translation_description: A preferences menu label for enabling sound effects

string.name: menu_gallery
string.translation_description: Menu item label to open the image gallery

string.name: gallery_image_search_btn
string.translation_description: Button in the gallery to locate the displayed object on the sky map

string.name: gallery_image_back_btn
string.translation_description: Button to return to the gallery from a single image view

string.name: hubble_image_gallery_title
string.translation_description: Title of the image gallery screen

resources.string: Skyマップのハッブルギャラリー

string.name: hubble_image
string.translation_description: Label or caption for a Hubble Space Telescope image in the gallery

string.name: search_overlay_title
string.translation_description: title for search overlay

resources.string: 携帯を矢印の方に向けます

string.name: search_target_looking_message
string.translation_description: displayed when a search target is being searched for

string.name: search_target_found_message
string.translation_description: displayed when a search target has been found and is centered on screen

string.name: sun_wont_set_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when the sun will not set during the next 24 hours (polar day / midnight sun)

resources.string: この場所では今後24時間以内に太陽が沈むことはありません。

string.name: menu_tos
string.translation_description: Menu item label to view the Terms of Service

string.name: menu_diagnostics
string.translation_description: Menu item label to open the technical diagnostics screen

string.name: north_pole
string.translation_description: Short abbreviation for the North Celestial Pole, displayed as a label on the sky map grid. Translators: use the standard abbreviation in your language (e.g. NP in English, PN in French).

string.name: south_pole
string.translation_description: Short abbreviation for the South Celestial Pole, displayed as a label on the sky map grid. Translators: use the standard abbreviation in your language (e.g. SP in English, PS in French).

string.name: enable_analytics
string.translation_description: Preference label to opt in to sending anonymous usage statistics

string.name: enable_analytics_desc
string.translation_description: Description/summary for the usage statistics preference

resources.string: Google Analyticsに匿名データを送信することでSkyマップの改良に協力する

string.name: no_sensor_warning
string.translation_description: Warning shown when required orientation sensors are not detected on the device

resources.string: このデバイスは位置センサーが不足しています - 自動モードは動作しないかもしれません

string.name: warning_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title of a warning dialog shown when something is wrong, e.g. a missing sensor

string.name: missing_sensor_dialog_text
string.translation_description: Dialog message shown when the device appears to be missing the compass or accelerometer sensors needed for auto mode

resources.string: Sky Mapが星を自動で追跡するには、デバイスに内蔵されたコンパスと加速度計が必要です。お使いのデバイスにはこれらのいずれかが搭載されていないようです。 心配しないでください。手動モードでも宇宙を探索できます。指を使って夜空をドラッグ、回転、ズームして、自分のペースで楽しむことができます。

string.name: do_not_show_again
string.translation_description: Checkbox or button label to suppress future display of a warning dialog

resources.string: このメッセージを再び表示しない

string.name: title_activity_diagnostic
string.translation_description: Title bar text for the Diagnostics activity/screen

string.name: play_services_error
string.translation_description: Warning shown in the diagnostics screen when Google Play Services has an error that may affect automatic location

resources.string: 警告: Google Play Services エラー - 自動位置判定は動作しないかもしれません

string.name: sensor_absent
string.translation_description: Sensor status shown in diagnostics when the sensor is not present on the device

string.name: sensor_accuracy_unknown
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown in the diagnostics screen and calibration dialog

string.name: sensor_accuracy_unreliable
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown in the diagnostics screen and calibration dialog

resources.string: 精度: 信頼できない

string.name: sensor_accuracy_low
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown in the diagnostics screen and calibration dialog

string.name: sensor_accuracy_medium
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown in the diagnostics screen and calibration dialog

string.name: sensor_accuracy_high
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown in the diagnostics screen and calibration dialog

string.name: sensor_accuracy_nocontact
string.translation_description: Sensor accuracy level shown when the sensor has no contact (e.g. heart-rate sensor lifted from skin) — unlikely to appear in Sky Map but included for completeness

string.name: diagnostics_activity_general_heading
string.translation_description: Section heading in the Diagnostics screen for general device information

string.name: diagnostics_activity_phone
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the device model name

string.name: diagnostics_activity_android_version
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the Android OS version

string.name: diagnostics_activity_sky_map_version
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the Sky Map app version

string.name: diagnostics_activity_sensors_heading
string.translation_description: Section heading in the Diagnostics screen for sensor readings

string.name: diagnostics_activity_compass
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the compass (magnetic field) sensor

string.name: diagnostics_activity_accelerometer
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the accelerometer sensor

string.name: diagnostics_activity_rotation_vector
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the rotation vector (combined orientation) sensor

string.name: diagnostics_activity_gyroscope
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the gyroscope sensor

string.name: diagnostics_activity_light_level
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the ambient light sensor reading

string.name: diagnostics_activity_location_and_time_heading
string.translation_description: Section heading in the Diagnostics screen for location and time information

string.name: diagnostics_activity_location_permission
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen showing whether location permission has been granted

string.name: diagnostics_activity_location_permission_granted
string.translation_description: Status value shown when location permission has been granted

string.name: diagnostics_activity_location_permission_denied
string.translation_description: Status value shown when location permission has been denied

string.name: diagnostics_activity_location
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen showing the current latitude and longitude

string.name: diagnostics_activity_pointing_ra_dec
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen showing a snapshot of where the phone is currently pointing in the sky (Right Ascension and Declination)

string.name: diagnostics_activity_magnetic_correction
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen showing whether magnetic declination correction is applied

string.name: diagnostics_activity_local_datetime
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the local date and time

string.name: diagnostics_activity_universal_time
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the UTC/universal date and time

string.name: diagnostics_activity_network_heading
string.translation_description: Section heading in the Diagnostics screen for network connectivity information

string.name: diagnostics_activity_connection
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen for the current network connection status

string.name: diagnostics_activity_rotation_matrix
string.translation_description: Row label in the Diagnostics screen showing the raw device rotation matrix used for orientation

string.name: enabled
string.translation_description: Generic status value meaning a feature or sensor is enabled/active

string.name: disabled
string.translation_description: Generic status value meaning a feature or sensor is disabled/inactive

string.name: permission_disabled
string.translation_description: Status value shown when a feature is unavailable because its permission was not granted

string.name: no_gps
string.translation_description: Status value shown in diagnostics when no GPS provider is available

string.name: connected
string.translation_description: Network status value shown when the device has an active network connection

string.name: disconnected
string.translation_description: Network status value shown when the device has no network connection

string.name: wifi
string.translation_description: Network type suffix appended to the connection status (e.g. \'Connected (wifi)\'). Note the leading space.

string.name: cell_network
string.translation_description: Network type suffix appended to the connection status (e.g. \'Connected (cell)\'). Note the leading space.

string.name: menu_calibrate
string.translation_description: Menu item label to open the compass calibration screen

string.name: compass_calibration_activity_heading_compass
string.translation_description: Static label in the compass calibration screen placed inline to the left of the live compass accuracy value (e.g. displayed as \'Compass - Accuracy: High\')

string.name: compass_calibration_activity_do_not_show_this_again
string.translation_description: Checkbox label in the compass calibration dialog to suppress future automatic appearances

resources.string: これを再び表示しない

string.name: compass_calibration_activity_warning
string.translation_description: Heading/reason text shown in the compass calibration dialog when it opens automatically due to low accuracy

resources.string: お使いのスマートフォンのコンパスに注意が必要です

string.name: compass_calibration_activity_user_heading
string.translation_description: Heading shown in the compass calibration dialog when the user opens it manually from the menu

resources.string: お使いのスマートフォンのコンパス

string.name: compass_calib_what_to_do
string.translation_description: Information for the user on how to calibrate the compass when the dialog auto-opens. Placeholder is the video URL

resources.string:
お使いの携帯電話のコンパスセンサーが低精度を報告しています。フィギュア8モーション（%s）は、携帯電話にハードウェアセンサーの再キャリブレーションを促します。Sky Mapはこのプロセスを制御できません。

キャリブレーション済みは正確を意味しません。フィギュア8ジェスチャーはセンサーが内部で自身を正規化するのに役立ちますが、近くの金属物、車のダッシュボード、または磁気携帯電話ケースからの干渉を除去することはできません。キャリブレーション後もマップがずれている場合、それらの外部ソースが最も可能性の高い原因です。Sky Mapではありません。

金属から離れた開放的な場所に移動してもう一度試してください。詳細な手順については、ヘルプのトラブルシューティングを参照してください。

string.name: compass_calib_what_to_do_user
string.translation_description: Information for the user on how to calibrate the compass when they invoke the calibration dialog. Placeholder is the video URL

resources.string:
お使いのスマートフォンは、上記のようにコンパス精度を報告しています。フィギュア8モーション（%s）により、スマートフォンのハードウェアがコンパスセンサーを再キャリブレーションするよう促されます。

重要な区別：キャリブレーションはセンサーが内部で自身を正規化するのに役立ちます。キャリブレーションされたコンパスが必ずしも正確であるとは限りません。局所的な磁気干渉（金属物体、車のダッシュボード、磁気スマートフォンケース）により、地図が間違った方向を指す可能性があります。Sky Mapはお使いのスマートフォンのセンサーが報告する内容を正確に読み取ります。環境に対応する方法はありません。

ヘルプのトラブルシューティングを参照して、一貫した方向誤差のあるスマートフォン向けの手動コンパスオフセットを含む他のステップを確認してください。

string.name: compass_low_accuracy_toast
string.translation_description: Brief toast shown when compass accuracy is low and the user has disabled the calibration dialog

resources.string: お使いのスマートフォンのコンパスの精度が低くなっています

string.name: sensor_reverse_preference_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for reversing the magnetic Z-axis sensor reading, a fix for certain phones with incorrectly implemented sensors

resources.string: 磁気センサーのZ軸を反転

string.name: sensor_reverse_preference_summary
string.translation_description: Summary for the Reverse Magnetic Z preference

resources.string: センサーの実装が不適切なデバイス用に修正する - 再起動が必要

string.name: whats_new_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title of the dialog shown on first launch after an update, listing new features

string.name: disable_gyro_preference_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for disabling the gyroscope sensor

resources.string: ジャイロスコープを無効にする

string.name: disable_gyro_preference_summary
string.translation_description: Explanation of the disable gyroscope preference and when to use it

resources.string: ジャイロのないデバイスもあります - あるデバイスの場合はそれを有効にしてチェックを外すことでより良い結果が得られます。一方、デバイスにジャイロがない場合は、このチェックを外すとおそらくSkyマップは動作しないでしょう。

string.name: rotate_horizon_preference_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for choosing the view/pointing direction mode

string.name: auto_level_horizon_preference_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for the auto-level horizon feature in manual mode

string.name: auto_level_horizon_preference_summary
string.translation_description: Summary for the auto-level horizon preference

resources.string: 手動モードでは、指を離すと地平線が徐々に水平に戻ります

string.name: rotate_horizon_preference_summary
string.translation_description: Explanation of the view direction preference, covering both landscape rotation and pointer modes

resources.string: 水平線を90°回転 (横画面固定のデバイス用) またはデバイスの上部分が何を指して いるかを表示するためのポインターモード(ヘルプ参照)。

string.name: show_object_info_pref_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for showing info cards when tapping objects

string.name: show_object_info_pref_summary
string.translation_description: Preference summary for the tap info feature

resources.string: 天体をタップして詳細を確認

string.name: show_object_info_auto_mode_title
string.translation_description: Preference title for enabling info cards in auto/sensor mode

resources.string: 自動モードでの情報カード

string.name: show_object_info_auto_mode_summary
string.translation_description: Preference summary for auto mode info cards

resources.string: 自動（センサー）モードでもオブジェクトをタップして情報カードを表示

string.name: object_info_funfact_label
string.translation_description: Label before the fun fact in info card

string.name: object_info_also_known_as
string.translation_description: Subtitle showing alternate names for a celestial object, e.g. \'Also known as: NGC 253 · Silver Dollar Galaxy\'

string.name: object_info_see_also_label
string.translation_description: Label for the see also section in info card

string.name: object_info_distance_label
string.translation_description: Label for distance field

string.name: object_info_size_label
string.translation_description: Label for size field

string.name: object_info_mass_label
string.translation_description: Label for mass field

string.name: object_info_spectral_label
string.translation_description: Label for spectral class

string.name: object_info_magnitude_label
string.translation_description: Label for apparent magnitude

string.name: object_info_image_content_description
string.translation_description: Accessibility description for celestial object photo

string.name: object_info_tap_to_expand
string.translation_description: Hint shown on image to tap to expand

string.name: object_info_tap_to_close
string.translation_description: Hint shown on expanded image to tap to close

string.name: action_find_in_sky_map
string.translation_description: Button label that opens the star map and searches for the displayed object

string.name: auto_level_horizon_on
string.translation_description: Toast message when auto-level horizon is enabled

resources.string: 地平線の自動レベリングがオン

string.name: auto_level_horizon_off
string.translation_description: Toast message when auto-level horizon is disabled

resources.string: 地平線の自動レベリングがオフ

string.name: warm_welcome_title
string.translation_description: Title of the Warm Welcome screen

string.name: warm_welcome_slide1_title
string.translation_description: Title for the first slide of the Warm Welcome

string.name: warm_welcome_slide1_desc
string.translation_description: Description for the first slide of the Warm Welcome

resources.string: 左側のレイヤーを使用して、星、星座、惑星などをフィルタリングできます。ボルテックスをタップして時間を移動するか、アイをタップしてナイトモードにしてください。Vortex to travel through time, or the Eye for night mode. Vortex to travel through time, or the Eye for night mode.

string.name: warm_welcome_slide2_title
string.translation_description: Title for the second slide of the Warm Welcome

string.name: warm_welcome_slide2_desc
string.translation_description: Description for the second slide of the Warm Welcome

resources.string: オートモードで電話を向けて周りを見るか、タップしてマニュアルに切り替えてスワイプで探索します。マニュアルでダブルタップすると地平線がリセットされます。Auto Mode, or tap to switch to Manual and explore by swiping. Double-tap in Manual to reset your horizon. Auto Mode, or tap to switch to Manual and explore by swiping. Double-tap in Manual to reset your horizon.

string.name: warm_welcome_slide2_info_desc
string.translation_description: Description about info cards on the second slide

resources.string: マニュアルモードで任意のオブジェクトをタップすると、楽しい事実と天体の詳細を含む情報カードが表示されます。

string.name: warm_welcome_slide3_title
string.translation_description: Title for the third slide of the Warm Welcome

resources.string: センサーとキャリブレーション

string.name: warm_welcome_slide3_desc
string.translation_description: Description for the third slide of the Warm Welcome

resources.string: Sky Mapはお使いのスマートフォンのセンサーを使って星と位置を合わせます。

string.name: warm_welcome_slide3_no_sensors
string.translation_description: Fallback message when sensors are missing

resources.string: お使いのデバイスに自動追跡に必要なセンサーがないようです。ご心配なく—マニュアルモードで宇宙全体を探索できます！Manual Mode!Manual Mode!

string.name: warm_welcome_slide3_compass_calib
string.translation_description: Compass calibration text on slide 3

resources.string: 精度を保つため、スマートフォンを時々8の字に振ってください。figure-8 wave every once in a while.figure-8 wave every once in a while.

string.name: tutorial_planets
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for planets layer

string.name: tutorial_meteors
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for meteors layer

string.name: tutorial_grid
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for grid layer

string.name: tutorial_night_mode
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for night mode

string.name: tutorial_time_travel
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for time travel

string.name: tutorial_manual_auto
string.translation_description: Tutorial annotation for manual/auto toggle

string.name: warm_welcome_skip
string.translation_description: Button to skip the Warm Welcome

string.name: warm_welcome_next
string.translation_description: Button to go to the next slide

string.name: warm_welcome_finish
string.translation_description: Button to finish the Warm Welcome and start exploring. Needs to be short - the width of 9 letter Ms maximum.

string.name: warm_welcome_do_not_show
string.translation_description: Checkbox to not show the Warm Welcome again

string.name: menu_tutorial
string.translation_description: Menu item for re-showing the warm welcome tutorial

string.name: warm_welcome_sensor_ok
string.translation_description: Status when a sensor is working fine

string.name: warm_welcome_sensor_missing
string.translation_description: Status when a sensor is missing

string.name: preferences_auto_mode_title
string.translation_description: Label for the toggle between manual and automatic modes
